response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with roughly 15 years of professional development, including recent full-stack work in the core TypeScript/Node.js/React stack, MongoDB, Docker/Kubernetes, and AWS exposure. Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq directly matches the AI agent development requirement, and a strong testing/TDD background (test libraries authored, TDD practice at RIDE) aligns with the quality expectations. Gaps are mostly around specific frameworks (Nest.js, Vitest/Playwright not explicitly listed) and limited stated Kotlin experience, which are learnable given the breadth demonstrated.
strengths: Deep full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and cloud/container tooling
Recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP development experience, a rare and explicitly required skill
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored test frameworks, taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin/Java exposure appears dated and light relative to the secondary stack needs
Significant career time in niche technologies (DLang, Ember.js) rather than the target ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and modern JVM stack exposure
